name: Pretzel Jello
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and mix with the pretzels. Spread in a 9 x 12 pan and bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Dissolve the Jell-O in boiling water and let it cool slightly before adding sugar, then stir in cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add the cooled mixture of cream cheese and sugar to the large cool whip until combined.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the baked pretzels once they have cooled completely.
5. Pour the Jell-O layer over the cream cheese layer, ensuring it covers the top surface.
6. Refrigerate until set up.
